hero.headline: Beauty, on your schedule.
hero.lead: Nails, hair, skin and makeup under one elegant roof. Pick your service, choose your artist, and book a time that fits your day — all in under a minute.

valueProps.title: Real-time booking
valueProps.text: See live openings by artist and chair — no phone tag, no waiting on hold.

valueProps.title: Your favorite artist
valueProps.text: Request the hands you trust, or let us match you with the right specialist.

valueProps.title: Clean, calm space
valueProps.text: Sanitized stations, premium products, and a little quiet luxury every visit.

trust.title: Hospital-grade hygiene
trust.text: Tools sterilized in an autoclave; single-use files & buffers on every service.

trust.title: Licensed artists
trust.text: Every technician is state-licensed and trained in the latest techniques.

trust.title: Clean, vegan products
trust.text: Cruelty-free, low-odor polishes and premium care for sensitive skin & nails.

categories.name: Nails
categories.blurb: Manicures, pedicures, gel, acrylic & nail art.

services.name: Classic Manicure
services.description: Shape, cuticle care, buff, and a flawless polish of your choice.

services.name: Gel Manicure
services.description: Long-lasting, high-shine gel color cured to a chip-free finish.

services.name: Deluxe Spa Pedicure
services.description: Warm soak, exfoliating scrub, paraffin, massage, and polish.

services.name: Acrylic Full Set
services.description: Custom-sculpted acrylic extensions in your chosen shape and length.

services.name: Nail Art (per nail)
services.description: Hand-painted designs, chrome, foils, gems and seasonal looks.

services.name: Cut & Style
services.description: Consultation, precision cut, and a finished blow-dry style.

services.name: Full Color
services.description: All-over permanent color with gloss and conditioning finish.

services.name: Balayage
services.description: Hand-painted, sun-kissed dimension tailored to your tone.

services.name: Blowout
services.description: Smooth, voluminous, camera-ready finish for any occasion.

services.name: Signature Facial
services.description: Cleanse, exfoliate, extract, mask and massage for glowing skin.

services.name: Brow Shape & Tint
services.description: Threading or waxing plus tint for defined, polished brows.

services.name: Lash Lift & Tint
services.description: Lifted, darkened lashes for an effortless wide-awake look.

services.name: Full Leg Wax
services.description: Smooth, long-lasting results with gentle premium wax.

services.name: Event Makeup
services.description: Custom glam for parties, photoshoots and nights out.

services.name: Bridal Makeup Trial
services.description: A relaxed trial to perfect your wedding-day look in advance.

staff.name: Ava Bennett
staff.title: Senior Nail & Makeup Artist
staff.bio: Ten years turning nails and faces into art. Loves clean lines and bold color.

staff.name: Noor Haddad
staff.title: Esthetician & Nail Tech
staff.bio: Skin-first philosophy with a gentle, calming touch your face will thank you for.

staff.name: Lily Tran
staff.title: Nail Artist
staff.bio: The designs on your feed? She can do those. Detail obsessed and proud of it.

staff.name: Maya Rivera
staff.title: Master Colorist & Stylist
staff.bio: Balayage specialist who treats every head of hair like a personal canvas.

packages.name: Gel Mani 6-Pack
packages.description: Six gel manicures — save $42 versus paying each visit.

packages.name: Glow Facial Trio
packages.description: Three signature facials at a members' rate.

gallery.title: Rich brunette

gallery.caption: Flawless all-day bridal look, tested before the big day.
